item.title: Mathematical Aspects of Data Science Summer School (EFPL)
item.description: Attended the Mathematical Aspects of Data Science Summer School at EFPL in Lausanne, Switzerland. I also presented a poster titled: Computing Empirical Barycenters on Unknown Wasserstein Submanifolds.

item.title: Princeton Machine Learning Theory Summer School
item.description: I was funded to attend the Princeton Machine Learning Theory Summer School. During the program, I presented my poster: Computing Empirical Barycenters on Unknown Wasserstein Submanifolds.

item.title: Convergence Rates for Riemannian Proximal Bundle Methods
item.description: Presented my research on Riemannian Proximal Bundle Methods at the International Conference on Continuous Optimization (ICCOPT) held at the University of Southern California.

item.title: Session Chair at ICCOPT 2025
item.description: I had the pleasure of serving as a Session Chair for “Optimization on Manifolds and Geometric Approaches” at the International Conference on Continuous Optimization (ICCOPT) in Summer 2025.

item.title: Talk at Jr. Mathematical Institute of Data Science (MINDS)
item.description: Presented at the Jr. MINDS Seminar at Johns Hopkins University regarding convergence rates for Riemannian Proximal Bundle Methods.

item.title: SIAM Conference on Applied Mathematics
item.description: Presented a poster titled Computing Empirical Barycenters on Unknown Wasserstein Submanifolds at the SIAM Conference on Applied Mathematics.

item.title: Statistics and Optimal Transport Workshop at Columbia
item.description: I attended the Statistics and Optimal Transport Workshop at Columbia University. I also presented a poster on computing empirical barycenters on unknown Wasserstein submanifolds.

item.title: Optimization Workshop at Universidad de los Andes
item.description: I was funded to participate in the Optimization Workshop at Universidad de los Andes in Bogotá, Colombia, where I presented my work on Wasserstein submanifolds.

item.title: Empirical Wasserstein Barycenters: Riemannian Optimization Guarantees
item.description: Discussed Riemannian optimization guarantees for empirical Wasserstein barycenters at the JHU AMS Student Seminar.

item.title: Duncand Research Fund Grant
item.description: I am grateful to have received the Duncand Research Fund Grant, which supported my attendance at the Summer School on Mathematical Aspects of Data Science at EFPL in Switzerland.

item.title: Princeton Machine Learning Theory Summer Graduate School
item.description: Received funding to attend the Princeton Machine Learning Theory Summer Graduate School.

item.title: SLMath Summer Graduate School
item.description: Participated in the SLMath (formerly MSRI) Summer Graduate School at UC Berkeley, focused on “Interacting Particle Systems: Analysis and Computation.”

item.title: ICERM Workshop: Interacting Particle Systems
item.description: Participated in the ICERM workshop at Brown University focused on Interacting Particle Systems: Analysis, Control, Learning and Computation.

item.title: Whiting School of Engineering Teaching Assistant Award
item.description: I am honored to be the sole recipient of the 2024 Whiting School of Engineering (WSE) Teaching Assistant Award. This award recognizes excellence and talent as a graduate Teaching Assistant across the entire school.

item.title: Rufus P. Isaacs Graduate Fellowship
item.description: Awarded the Rufus P. Isaacs Graduate Fellowship for the Fall 2023 and Spring 2024 semesters at Johns Hopkins University.

item.title: ICERM Workshop: Modern Applied and Computational Analysis
item.description: Attended the Modern Applied and Computational Analysis workshop at ICERM (Brown University).

item.title: ICERM Workshop: Optimal Transport
item.description: I was a funded participant in the Optimal Transport workshop at ICERM, Brown University.
